outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran vows retaliation over ship seizure as doubts grow over talks
outlets.summary: Live coverage of IRGC drone retaliation on US ships, Iran refusing Round 2 talks, ceasefire expiring in 48 hours. Baghaei: 'no plans for negotiations.'

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Ceasefire means Netanyahu can't keep promises, many Israelis say as elections loom
outlets.summary: Israeli domestic politics under strain as ceasefire limits Netanyahu's ability to deliver on war promises. Polls show declining support for continued conflict.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Hegseth warns Iranian leaders to 'choose wisely' — 'We are locked and loaded'
outlets.summary: Defense Secretary Hegseth warns Iran US is 'reloaded with more power than ever before' and has 'better intelligence.' Targets Iran's energy and power infrastructure.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Trump announces US Navy seized blockade-defying Iranian cargo vessel after 'blowing a hole' in engine room
outlets.summary: Trump announces USS Spruance seizure of Iranian ship Touska. First ship physically taken under US blockade. Iran fires drones at US ships in retaliation.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: What is happening on day 52 of US-Israeli attacks?
outlets.summary: Day 52 overview: IRGC drones on US ships, Iran refuses talks, USS Ford enters Red Sea, 48h to ceasefire expiry. Hormuz at complete standstill.

outlets.name: BBC/CBC
outlets.headline: Iran vows retaliation after accusing U.S. of 'armed piracy' amid duelling blockades
outlets.summary: Focus on dual US-Iran blockade creating maritime crisis. Khatam al-Anbiya vows response. Diplomacy collapsed.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Pakistan intensifying diplomatic efforts to ensure US-Iran talks go ahead Tuesday
outlets.summary: Pakistan Army Chief Munir traveled to Tehran. PM Sharif in 45-min call with Pezeshkian. Vance/Witkoff/Kushner heading to Islamabad. Iran refusing to attend.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Lebanese lawmaker accuses Israel of destruction in 39 southern Lebanon villages
outlets.summary: Satellite imagery confirms 1,400+ buildings demolished. IDF kills Hezbollah operative at Yellow Line. Reservist Porat killed by IED.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran pushed back enemy using asymmetric warfare strategy: Qalibaf
outlets.summary: Qalibaf warns US minesweepers will be fired upon. Claims 'progress' in talks while military 'fully prepared.' Iran rejects US demands as 'childish.'

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: No second round of talks — Washington's demands are 'excessive' and 'childish'
outlets.summary: IRNA via Baghaei officially declines Islamabad Round 2. Cites 'excessive demands, unrealistic expectations, constant shifts, repeated contradictions, and ongoing naval blockade.'
